# ReviewNet Skill Manifest

## Purpose

Perform standards-driven .NET review with route-specific context.

## Boundaries

- In scope: review guidelines, PR checklist, code-review output structuring.
- Out of scope: architecture authoring, OHIP implementation, tax business logic.

## Primary Files by Concern

- Full review: `REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md`
- Quick gate: `PR_CHECKLIST.md`

## Loading Objective

Default to quick checklist for ambiguous review asks, escalate to full guidelines only when needed.
